meta_title: For Founders: SaaS starter kit to Solve no portfolio (Beginner Resource Page)
meta_description: Learn how to SaaS starter kit and overcome no portfolio. A Beginner-level Resource Page using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: SaaS starter kit to Solve no portfolio
content.seo_description: Learn how to use a SaaS starter kit to overcome the 'no portfolio' trap. Master Antigravity and Claude Code to launch your MVP faster.
content.answer_block: The 'no portfolio' trap is a myth; founders don't need a history of projects, they need a high-conversion MVP. By leveraging an enterprise-grade SaaS starter kit, you bypass months of boilerplate development, allowing you to ship a production-ready application in days, effectively replacing a portfolio with a revenue-generating product.
content.intro:
You’re staring at a blank screen, paralyzed by the 'no portfolio' syndrome. You have the vision, but every potential client or investor asks for proof of work you haven't built yet. It’s a vicious cycle where you can't get the contract because you lack the history, and you can't get the history because you lack the contract.

Stop waiting for permission to be an expert. The era of the artisanal, handcrafted codebase is over; the era of the AI-accelerated founder is here. By utilizing a robust SaaS starter kit, you aren't just building a project—you're deploying a business architecture that signals competence, reliability, and speed to market. Let’s turn that blank screen into a deployed revenue engine.

steps.title: Select a High-Conversion Boilerplate
steps.description: Don't reinvent authentication, billing, or database schemas. Choose a starter kit that includes Stripe integration and Auth0/NextAuth out of the box.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold a SaaS starter kit project structure using Next.js 14, Tailwind CSS, and Prisma, ensuring it includes user authentication and Stripe checkout flow.

steps.title: Define the Domain Schema
steps.description: Your database schema is the skeleton of your business. Use AI to map your business logic to a normalized relational structure.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a Prisma schema for a B2B SaaS platform that includes User, Subscription, and Project entities with proper relationship definitions.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'update schema.prisma with new models'

steps.title: Implement Core Business Logic
steps.description: Focus on the 'Unique Value Proposition.' Use Claude Code to write your primary service functions while the boilerplate handles the infrastructure.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a service layer function that processes user input and interacts with the OpenAI API, following clean architecture principles.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'create api endpoint for data processing'

steps.title: Integrate Payment Infrastructure
steps.description: Revenue is the only metric that matters. Configure your Stripe webhooks to handle subscription lifecycles automatically.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a Stripe webhook handler that updates the database subscription status when a payment is successful.

steps.title: Deploy to Production
steps.description: Avoid the 'localhost' trap. Deploy your MVP to Vercel or Railway immediately to validate your URL in the real world.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Provide the configuration steps for a production-ready deployment on Vercel, including environment variable setup.

pro_tips: Never build from scratch; prioritize 'copy-paste-configure' workflows to minimize technical debt.
Focus on the 'Happy Path' for your MVP; ignore edge cases until you have your first paying customer.
Use Claude Code to document your codebase as you write it; this creates a 'digital paper trail' of your technical competence.
Prioritize mobile-responsive design from day one; 60% of B2B decision-makers will view your product on a phone.
Ship the MVP in under 72 hours; speed is the ultimate indicator of founder capability to investors.
content.next_steps: Once your MVP is deployed, immediately set up an analytics dashboard to track user behavior and iterate based on real feedback, not assumptions.
content.conversion_block: You now have the technical blueprint to bypass the 'no portfolio' bottleneck and launch a product that demands respect. Don't let hesitation be the reason your idea stays in the dark. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
